'''ragala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wussy|wussy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-g-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wussy|wussy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ragala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rægælæth|rægælæth]] || [[word:rægælæj|rægælæj]] || [[word:rægælæsh|rægælæsh]] || [[word:rægælæ|rægælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ragagalath|ragagalath]] || [[word:ragagalaj|ragagalaj]] || [[word:ragagalash|ragagalash]] || [[word:ragagala|ragagala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ragalath|ragalath]] || [[word:ragalaj|ragalaj]] || [[word:ragalash|ragalash]] || [[word:ragala|ragala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ragaflath|ragaflath]] || [[word:ragaflaj|ragaflaj]] || [[word:ragaflash|ragaflash]] || [[word:ragaflaf|ragaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ragalatha|ragalatha]] || [[word:ragalaja|ragalaja]] || [[word:ragalasha|ragalasha]] || [[word:ragalaka|ragalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ragalath|ragalath]] || [[word:ragalaj|ragalaj]] || [[word:ragalash|ragalash]] || [[word:ragala|ragala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ragalathal|ragalathal]] || [[word:ragalajal|ragalajal]] || [[word:ragalashal|ragalashal]] || [[word:ragalakal|ragalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ragalathatha|ragalathatha]] || [[word:ragalajaja|ragalajaja]] || [[word:ragalashasha|ragalashasha]] || [[word:ragalaka|ragalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ragalathan|ragalathan]] || [[word:ragalajan|ragalajan]] || [[word:ragalashan|ragalashan]] || [[word:ragalakan|ragalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ragalathaoro|ragalathaoro]] || [[word:ragalajaoro|ragalajaoro]] || [[word:ragalashaoro|ragalashaoro]] || [[word:ragalakaoro|ragalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
